title: Disney Frozen 2 (Snow Sparkles) A5 Confetti Notebook
features: Officially licensed Product By pyramid international
Has snowflake confetti in the cover, creating a pretty snowstorm on the notebook.
Size A5, great for storing easily.
description: "Let the storm rage on", purchase this confetti notebook and feel like a part of the frozen 2 cast in the middle of a snowstorm! Features a metallic purple trim around the outside, A purple background with Anna and Elsa on the front, and Olaf on the back.
